Text from friend: You should look at time you were born and human design to come up with schedule and see how you work best if it’s implement first thing in am and then have rest of day to play and come up with ideas or else I like having my mornings for me and the ideas get me in alignment and motivated and then it’s easier for me to be productive around my birth time (3pm) and so that’s how I work the best Let's do what she suggested

|\[ST4RT.io:: HUMAN DESIGN + BIRTH TIME SCHEDULE MAPPING \]|

To execute what your friend suggested, we'll follow a structured process that combines **Human Design**, **astrological birth time mapping**, and **creative system design** to generate a custom daily rhythm schedule optimized for your energy and productivity patterns.
